productDisplayName: Hush Puppies Men Walsh Brown Sandals
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these sandals from hush puppies are made for you. These fisherman style slip-ons are a great mix of classic styling and comfortable materials.Team these with jeans or chinos and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Stitch detailing for added style Velcro flap closure on the side for a snug Fit Textile lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all day comfort EVA midsole for better shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole with deep vertical and horizontal grooves for better grip Slight heel for ergonomic comfort Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
